risk_title: Security restrictions limiting project oversight and implementation
risk_summary: Security constraints prevent field travel and direct monitoring of project implementation across regions, reducing visibility into implementation quality and FCV-related risks on the ground.
evidence_quote: Due to security restrictions, no field travel was possible for this mission, so meetings were held in Bishoftu.

risk_title: Security issues affecting procurement and implementation pace
risk_summary: Security problems across all DRDIP II implementing regions are hampering implementation progress in region-specific ways, contributing to slow procurement and project delays.
evidence_quote: Security issues, inflation, and capacity gaps on some aspects (particularly irrigation) have led to relatively slow procurement... Security problems are prevalent in all DRIDP II implementing regions, hampering implementation progress in ways specific to each region though some of the challenges are shared by all regions.

risk_title: Capacity gaps in conflict-affected woredas affecting environmental and social safeguards
risk_summary: Challenges maintaining E&S focal persons in conflict-affected woredas are undermining environmental and social risk management implementation, a key safeguard for vulnerable populations including refugees.
evidence_quote: delay replacing the E&S expert in Somali region; and challenges maintaining E&S focal persons in conflict-affected woredas

risk_title: Tigray transition risks from UNOPS to government implementation
risk_summary: Handover of project implementation in Tigray from UNOPS to RPCU has caused delays and performance issues, with over 50% of pending activities in Tigray due to slow UNOPS performance and transition delays.
evidence_quote: More than 50 percent of the activities pending implementation are in Tigray due to slow performance by UNOPS and delays caused by the transition back to the RCPU.

risk_title: Refugee inclusion and social cohesion monitoring gaps
risk_summary: Limited data collection on the impact of social cohesion and inclusion activities between refugees and host communities, creating blind spots in understanding tensions and integration outcomes in displacement-affected areas.
evidence_quote: Limited information was presented on the impact of these activities... The World Bank will include data collection on social cohesion and inclusion in the proposed phone surveys.

risk_title: Refugee livelihood participation significantly below targets
risk_summary: Refugee beneficiary participation in livelihood programs is only 6% against a target of 30%, indicating potential exclusion of refugee populations from income-generating opportunities and economic integration.
evidence_quote: The percentage of refugee beneficiaries is just 6, versus an end target of 30 percent. The project will need to ensure that these targets are met in future financial years.

risk_title: Governance and coordination gaps with government sector offices
risk_summary: Some completed sub-projects are not yet functional because budget for operational costs has not been allocated by the government, indicating weak coordination and commitment from government entities to sustain project investments.
evidence_quote: Some completed sub-projects are not yet functional because budget for operational costs is not allocated yet by the government.

risk_title: Internal control gaps in Somali region affecting disbursement
risk_summary: Internal control gaps observed in Somali RPCU have led to suspension of recommended disbursements from FPCU, indicating governance and fiduciary risks in a conflict-affected region.
evidence_quote: Ensure that internal control gaps observed over payment processing at Somali RPCU are addressed. Recommended disbursement from FPCU to these regions are suspended until concrete actions are taken.

risk_title: Grievance redress system functionality challenges in conflict areas
risk_summary: While GRM structures are being strengthened, there are ongoing challenges in maintaining functional grievance redress mechanisms across all project sites, particularly in conflict-affected woredas where tensions may be high.
evidence_quote: Strengthen the functionality of all the established GRM at all levels to effectively record, resolve and report grievances related to the project implementation.
